---
title: "Hakkımda"
sidebar: false 
---

![](assets/images/vesikalik.jpeg){fig-align="center" width="220"}

## Oğuzhan Şenel

[CV'mi PDF olarak indir](docs/cv.pdf)

# Eğitim

-   B.S., Mechatronics Engineering, Duzce University, Turkey, 2014 - 2019.
-   M.S., Composite Material Technologies, Duzce University, Turkey, 2020 - 2022.
-   M.S., Engineering Management, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2026 - ongoing.

# İş Tecrübesi

## Employements

1.  Batı Çelik, Project Engineer, 2021 - 2024

2.  Mersan Metal, Planning Engineer, 2024 - still

## Internships

1.  Ant Mühendislik, R&D Engineer, 2017

# Projects

1.  DUBAP-2021.06.06-1168

# Publications

1.  O. Şenel, G. Samtaş, Critical Methane Density Detection Robot Prototype Design and Production, Manufacturing Technologies and Applications, 3(1), 33-46, 2022

# Competencies

Python, HTML, CSS, Arduino, Autocad, Inventor, Vault, Solidworks, Solidedge, Catia v5, CorelDRAW, DIA, MS Project

# Hobbies

Freshwater aquariums, Chess, Video Games
